name: Horseradish Sauce (Tlc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak fresh horseradish in cold water for one hour, then wash thoroughly before use.
2. Scrape the horseradish into very thin shreds using a sharp knife.
3. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form, then gently fold in the shredded horseradish, sugar, mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar. Pour the mixture into a jar.
